subject: SOCDS 2025/26 Update Week #16 - PreK Orange
text:
Email Ms. Annemarie
Museum Visits
The classes did a wonderful job presenting their artifacts to the rest of the school.  Children rotated through different classrooms and took turns presenting.
Holiday Wishes
As the year comes to a close, we wish your family a joyful holiday filled with togetherness, warmth, and meaningful moments.
Thank you for sharing your children with us—we hope this season brings time to reconnect and enjoy one another.
Extended - PEP Family Traditions 
Collection
PEP has extended their due date for the Family Traditions Collection.  Please use the link below to share your family traditions with the rest of the school.  Whether it's a cherished tradition passed down through generations, a special ritual you've created, meaningful foods you prepare, or the ways you mark this fresh beginning—we want to hear about it!
Share your stories, customs, recipes, or the special moments that make your holiday and New Year celebrations unique. Every contribution helps tell the story of who we are as a community.
If you have any questions or concerns please text (1-646-226-8790) or email learn@socds.com.
Annemarie
PEP Family Traditions
SOPAC New Years Eve "Noon" Concert
Art with Ms. Jenny
With the colder weather, art with Ms. Jenny took place in the classrooms. The children explored a variety of materials as they translated their outdoor observations into artwork.

@SOCDSMOMENTS
Logistics
Dress Appropriately for the Weather:
Please dress your child in appropriate gear for the day.  There is no bad weather just poor clothing.
Morning Snack
:  Please send in a morning, and if your child is staying for enrichment please send in an afternoon snack as well.  We generally allow children to choose their food and to listen to their bodies, but if you have any particular preference for what they eat and when, please just label the containers and we will accommodate.  Please remember we are a NUT FREE environment.
Water Bottles
:  Please send in a labeled water bottle with your child each day.  We do make sure that they drink water 
throughout the day.  We have two water fountains which we use to refill the bottles (so they may come home full.)
Parking:
Please remember that Vose Avenue is an active busy street.  Please pull up on the
school side
of Vose in front of the school.  It is safest to go around the block instead of turning around in driveways.  For your child's safety please try to have them leave your car from the sidewalk side of the car.
Please do not block our neighbors driveway, even for a few minutes.
Tuition:
As I receive payments I update the statement and send you a copy.  If you do not receive those from me please let me know.
Hours
Morning Care 7:30-8:30am
Morning Drop off is between 8:30-9am
Afternoon Pick Up is between 3:10- 3:20pm
Extended Day 3:20-5:30/5:45pm
South Orange Country Day School
461 Vose Avenue, South Orange
973.762.6451
